recovery_note: The agent initially failed to provide clear explanations but recovered by transferring the customer to the transfers team and providing a clear next step.
strengths: The agent provided clear next steps by transferring the customer to the transfers team, ensuring the customer's issue was still being addressed.
The agent demonstrated professional, empathetic, and clear communication throughout the conversation, maintaining a positive customer experience.
The agent was able to recover from an earlier mistake, showing resilience and adaptability in handling the customer's issue.
improvements: The agent needs to provide clear explanations of the issue or cause when encountering system limitations or unknown information.
The agent should strive to resolve the issue or provide a more definitive solution before transferring the customer to another team.
The agent should aim to improve policy compliance, specifically in providing clear explanations, to meet the expected standards.

rephrasing.original: The agent stated 'I really can't see the full details on my system.'
rephrasing.better: I'm experiencing some technical difficulties with my system, and I want to ensure I provide you with the most accurate information possible. Let me transfer you to our transfers team, and they will be able to assist you further.
